user.description: Sign in with your SmartyPlants account. Only plants with an assigned sensor will appear in Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.description: Your SmartyPlants session has expired. Please sign in again.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SmartyPlants. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This SmartyPlants account is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll SmartyPlants for updated readings (minimum 5 minutes).
data_description.show_status_sensors: Create additional sensors showing the SmartyPlants status (optimal, low, high, etc.) for each reading.
